headline: Senate returns Monday with judicial confirmation votes looming while House tackles energy and healthcare bills in committee markups!

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate was not in session on Saturday, July 18. Reports were filed on Medicare wheelchair payment rules and the fiscal year 2027 budget resolution.

onTheFloor.title: Nomination of Benjamin M. Flowers of Ohio to be United States Circuit Judge for the Sixth Circuit
onTheFloor.status: Cloture vote scheduled for Monday at 5:30 PM

house.lastSessionSummary: The House met briefly on Saturday for a two-minute session. Reports were filed on H.R. 1703 regarding Medicare wheelchair payment rules and H. Con. Res. 113 establishing the fiscal year 2027 congressional budget.

onTheFloor.title: Amend Medicare payment rules for manual wheelchairs under Part B
Establish congressional budget for fiscal year 2027 and budgetary levels through 2036

committees.topic: Closed business meeting on intelligence matters
Markup on 28 bills including energy grid acts, drug enforcement measures, healthcare transparency, and pipeline safety
Hearing on insider trading, capital access, budget resolution, appropriations, defense authorization, and work incentive legislation
Markup on H.R. 9624, Intelligence Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2027
